basic_details.job_title: HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter, Multipurpose Worker Posts
basic_details.post_name: Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter, Multipurpose Worker

age_limit.details: Para Pump Operator: Minimum Age: 18 Years, Maximum Age: 45 Years Para Fitter: Minimum Age: 18 Years, Maximum Age: 45 Years Multipurpose worker: Minimum Age: 18 Years, Maximum Age: 45 Years

qualification.education_qualification: Matriculation with ITI certificate in relevant trades for Para Pump Operator and Para Fitter. Middle pass for Multipurpose Worker.
qualification.details: Para Pump Operator: Matriculation (10th) with certificate in trade Electrician/ Wireman/ Diesel Mechanic/ Pump Mechanic/ Motor Mechanic/ Pump Operator cum Mechanic from a recognized ITI or Matriculation (10th) with certificate in above cited trades under skill Development schemes of the government. Experience of the related field of IPH/HPPWD/CPWD/PSU's or outsourcing agency providing services in HP Jal Shakti Vibhag. Related field for Pump Operators is operation and maintenance of pumping machinery allied electrical installation of Rural Water Supply schemes/Irrigation schemes. Para Fitter: Matriculation (10th) with certificate in trade Fitter/Plumber from a recognized ITI or Matriculation (10th) with certificate in above cited trades under skill Development schemes of the government. Experience of the related field of IPH/HPPWD/CPWD/PSU's or outsourcing agency providing services in HP Jal Shakti Vibhag. Related field for Fitter is maintaining in the village piped water supply infrastructure or distribution system of Rural Water Supply/Irrigation schemes. Multipurpose worker: Middle pass (8th) and it equivalent from school duly recognized by the state government. Experience of the related field of IPH/HPPWD/CPWD/PSU's or outsourcing agency providing services in HP Jal Shakti Vibhag.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 7100/- PM for Para Fitter/Para PO and Rs. 6000/- PM for MPW.
salary_details.details: Para Fitter: Rs. 7100/- P.M Para Pump Operator: Rs. 7100/- P.M Multipurpose worker: Rs. 6000/- P.M

selection_process: Skill test and Physical test Scrutiny of applications Skill test and Physical test
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://jsv.hp.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Recruitment 2026 is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the office by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for the posts of Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter, and Multipurpose Worker in the Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for the Multipurpose Worker post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Multipurpose Worker post is Middle pass (8th standard) or its equivalent from a school recognized by the state government.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Para Pump Operator and Para Fitter posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for both Para Pump Operator and Para Fitter posts is between 18 years to 45 years. No age relaxation details are provided.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for a Para Pump Operator?
faq.answer: The salary for a Para Pump Operator is Rs. 7100/- per month. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a scrutiny of applications followed by a skill test and a physical test for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Does the recruitment mention any application fee?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates applying for these posts.

faq.question: Q9. What kind of experience is required for the Para Fitter post?
faq.answer: For the Para Fitter post, experience in maintaining village piped water supply infrastructure or distribution systems of Rural Water Supply/Irrigation schemes is required, along with ITI certification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag. The link will be provided in the Important Links section.

faq.answer: The last date to apply for the HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Recruitment 2026 is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the office by this date.
